item.title: Fuck the mullahs: Free the Iranian/Persian people
item.dc:creator: LosPer

item.title: Things that made me go, 'Heh.' Part 92: The dinoraaaaar.
item.description:
1. I know it's old, but I still laugh because this is exactly what me and my brothers are like
2.
3.
4.
5. Bit of venting in the memes today...
6.
7.
8.
9.
10.
11.
12. Here's one for the dog-lovers :)
13.
14.
15.
16.
17.
18. I've had this conversation with someone. And that is too many people.
19.
20.
21.
22.
23.
24.
25.
26.
27. Taking a criminology class this year, and fuck does it ever fire me up. Illegality is a state of affairs created by those in power so they can retain power. Ideally laws are initially created for the benefit of everybody, but power-hungry assholes inevitably get a hold of those laws and the power and create corporate/monarchic/class-based hells capes for the poor and vulnerable.
28.
29.
30.
31. I just want the world to get better. What the fuck is wrong with that?
32.
33.
34. Imma call down now
35.
36....and one for the cat lovers :)
37.
38.
39.
40.
41.
42.
43. I don't crop shit. Ain't nobody got time for that
44.
45. Love me some board games. What's your favourite?
46.
47.
48.
49.
50. Thanks for stopping by! Have an awesome and amazing day! :D
item.dc:creator: Scrown0

item.title: Hachiko
item.dc:creator: upvotemypics

item.title: Pyramids of Giza
item.description:
Also just shows you how big they are actually
Perspective matters
I have a new pizza related goal if I ever get to Egypt. Edit: Whoohoo. Front page. danke I've been lucky enough to have been able to travel to some spectacular places all over the world. Havent had the opportunity for some years now, and I do miss visiting places I've never been or engaging with other cultures. There are always something new to discover or learn. So, as an alternative, I take a lazy Sunday afternoon and go on google street view and walk around cities. How lucky are we with some technology is brining some joy in this world.
item.dc:creator: AbeHamTraveler

item.title: sOoOo indestructible.
item.description: Social media 'influencers' planned to showcase a Cybertruck's prowess by having it demolish various objects. However, the tables turned when the truck itself was defeated on its very first challenge: taking on a fence. Found via: https://www.threads.net/@bird_hustle/post/C_q9AYPsIeI/ Original source: https://x.com/PiQSuite/status/1832837409161011289

item.title: Trying to get my coworker's attention. Side of memes
item.description:
Seriously. Trying to get it sent before lunch. You know I can see your workstation from the corridor, right?
My favorite board wipe. Might as well say „Six damage or scoop.“
Even horse apples are superior...
Silver Sharpie Vigilante, freeing us from the scourge of unnecessary marketing. We salute you.
????
I friggin' love Nashville.
My CPU is a neural-net processor; a learning computer. The more contact I have with humans, the more I learn.

item.title: Deviousness Day 139
item.description:
Bonus post cause it is my cake day! two years of posting deviousness memes and all yay! Linkies to the discord and the steam group and bigger spiel with more info about it at the bottom of the post! Deviousness discord that is 18+: https://discord.gg/deviousness Deviousness steam group: https://steamcommunity.com/groups/DeviousnessDiscord
The above image was made by the wonderful CammyJay! They have their own channel in the Deviousness discord where they share artwork and on fridays do drawings based on word prompts given by members. I has a Deviousness discord server! We have a general area for memes and discussions of all different SFWish topics! We have gaming fun! I am really bad about running events and being consistent. I do randomly show up in vc and game. All are welcome who want to game or watch us game or just hang out feel free to hop into the vc. please do be respectful if we are in game let us chat for the game. We have an opt in kink area for dirtier conversations and then a role locked area for deeper kink discussions! (It is role locked because we take privacy and security very seriously and the discord is a place with real people sharing and things being shared is a privilege) Thank you to everyone who has joined and made it such a unique and special place! Deviousness discord that is 18+: https://discord.gg/deviousness Deviousness steam group: https://steamcommunity.com/groups/DeviousnessDiscord
I love you *my* Daddy. Friendly reminder I am claimed so I would appreciate keeping that in mind when making comments towards me see dis: https://imgur.com/JipV5UR I has a post with links to all my past posts. enjoy: https://imgur.com/a/ZDA2CBe I am changing how I add people to my ping list so please see here to get added or removed: https://imgur.com/a/fFYOR2B there is now the option on desktop to follow when someone posts so feel free to do that and lemme know and I can remove you from the ping list. I dont think I will get rid of it entirely so if you prefer the special feeling of getting a ping it will also continue to be an option.
item.dc:creator: PotatoCheesMonk

item.title: Mikko's last trip across the Mississippi
item.description:
Our first trip together after he was rescued in 2015
Martin's first time walking across the Mississippi 2023
Mikko crossed for the last time today. He is now a part of the great Mississippi River.

item.title: Images of Note: Fragment shader
item.description:
That's one way of dealing with things.
This is basically what Arch Linux is.
"Wait, I'm uncool" then I remember I post daily meme dumps.
Open Source Software: It's your friend.
That's a good philosophy
shikanoko nokonoko koshitantan
:3
owo ktibby
Republicans don't care about breaking shit, they only care if the protests are against them.
Y A I N T
yeah basically
IF YOU KNOW YOU KNOW
technically "tar --help" is a valid command.
